{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip dhcp snooping trust
 ip arp inspection trust
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 no ip dhcp snooping trust
 ip verify source
exit
ip dhcp snooping binding 02:42:de:21:21:00 192.168.1.3 vlan 1 GigabitEthernet0/1
end
write memory"}
